items.title: Nancy Guthrie case: Kash Patel releases images, video of 'armed individual'
items.description: "We believe she is still alive. Bring her home," Savannah Guthrie responded.

items.title: Trump says his 'Great Ballroom' will be used for 'future Presidential Inaugurations'
items.description: President Donald Trump posted new drawings of his 'Great Ballroom' that he said would be "used for future Presidential Inaugurations."
